ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Continued To Jun-25-15 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dobrov for Carol Young (Executor).

Counsel provided the background of the estate and stated that the estate currently does not have money, there is a house that they are working on selling and requested to have the filing fee deferred until sale of the house. The Court granted the request to defer the filing fee and continued this hearing to June 25, 2015 at 2:00 p.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jeung. (Not Reported)
